summary: Balanced, well‑recorded performance with prominent Phil Lesh bass – considered one of the best of the bunch.
review: The reviewer praises this show as a standout among the collection, highlighting a balanced sound and an especially pronounced Phil Lesh presence. The recording avoids the tinny high‑end often heard on other rock‑venue tapes, delivering a clear and enjoyable listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 stars) noting good sound balance and strong performance; insufficient data for higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Balanced tonal quality, less tinny high end than comparable rock‑venue recordings; overall clear and well‑mixed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Phil: Reviewer notes increased Phil presence and bass prominence.
